token.title: How to get the Access Token?
token.intro: To obtain a long-lived Access Token for your LinkedIn page, you need to complete the OAuth 2.0 flow with a LinkedIn app:

steps.portal: Go to the <link>LinkedIn Developer Portal</link> and create an app.
steps.authIntro: In your app, open the Auth tab and configure:

authList.credentials: Copy your Client ID and Client Secret.

steps.products: In Products, enable: Share on LinkedIn and Sign In with LinkedIn.

token.warning: Tokens expire after 60 days. Set up automatic renewal to avoid interruptions.

page.title: How to find the page ID?
page.intro: Your LinkedIn page ID (Organization ID) is a unique number that identifies your company.
page.highlighted: The highlighted number is your ID. You can also use the full URN:

credentials.title: Application Credentials
credentials.note: Your credentials are stored encrypted and secure. We never share them.

longToken.title: 12-month Token (Refresh Token)
longToken.intro: The OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token is valid for 1 year.

points.auto: Allows you to request new Access Tokens automatically.
points.oauth: It is obtained by completing the OAuth authorization flow.

cta.title: Ready to boost your LinkedIn?

AboutPage.metaDescription: Learn more about Postslify and our mission to transform LinkedIn presence with AI.
AboutPage.label: Our Mission
AboutPage.title: Empowering Professionals on LinkedIn
AboutPage.intro: Postslify is dedicated to helping professionals and companies amplify their voice on LinkedIn through the power of Artificial Intelligence.

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
Postslify was born out of the need to simplify professional content creation. We realized that many experts had brilliant ideas but struggled to express them consistently on LinkedIn.

What started as an internal tool to optimize our own processes quickly evolved into a complete AI-powered platform designed to boost the personal brand of thousands of users.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content:
Our mission is to democratize access to high-quality content creation tools. We believe that every professional deserves to have a strong and clear voice in the digital world.

We strive to eliminate technical and creative barriers, allowing our users to focus on what they do best: sharing their knowledge and expertise.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.content:
Postslify uses advanced artificial intelligence algorithms to analyze trends, suggest relevant topics, and draft posts that capture your unique tone of voice.

  • Idea Generation: Never run out of topics to talk about.
  • Assisted Writing: Create engaging posts in seconds, not hours.
  • Smart Scheduling: Publish at the optimal time to maximize reach.

values.title: Our Values
values.content:
• Innovation: We are always looking for new ways to improve.
  • Transparency: We believe in honesty and clarity in everything we do.
  • User-Centric: Your success is our success. We design every feature with you in mind.

PrivacyPage.metaDescription: Read our Privacy Policy to understand how we handle your data.
PrivacyPage.label: Legal
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains in detail how we collect, use, protect, and share your personal information.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to Postslify. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy applies to all information collected through our website and related services (collectively, our "Services").

informationCollection.title: 2. Information We Collect
informationCollection.content:
We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register for the Services, when you participate in activities on the Services, or when you contact us.
  • Personal Information: Names, email addresses, passwords, contact preferences, and profile data.
  • Social Media Data: When you connect your LinkedIn account, we collect basic profile information and access tokens required to post content on your behalf. We do not store your LinkedIn passwords.
  • Generated Content: We store the posts, images, and voice settings you create using our platform.

useOfInformation.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
useOfInformation.content:
We process your information for purposes based on legitimate business interests, the fulfillment of our contract with you, compliance with our legal obligations, and/or your consent.
  • Service Provision: To facilitate account creation, login, and management of your LinkedIn posts.
  • Product Improvement: To analyze usage and optimize our AI algorithms and user experience.
  • Communications: To send you administrative updates, security notifications, and, with your consent, marketing information.

dataSharing.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
dataSharing.content:
We only share information with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide services, to protect your rights, or to fulfill business obligations.
  • Service Providers: We share data with third-party vendors who assist us with hosting, data analysis, payment processing, and customer service (e.g., Vercel, Supabase, OpenAI).

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We have implemented rigorous technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the integrity and confidentiality of your personal information. We use advanced encryption and secure protocols to ensure your data is safeguarded at all times during transmission and storage within our systems.

userRights.title: 6. Your Privacy Rights
userRights.content:
Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
  • Right to access and portability: Request copies of your personal information.
  • Right to rectification: Request that we correct inaccurate information.
  • Right to erasure: Request that we delete your personal information.
  • Right to withdraw consent: If we rely on your consent to process your personal information, you have the right to withdraw it at any time.

cookies.title: 7. Cookie Policy
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies (like web beacons and pixels) to access or store information. This information is used to keep your session active, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by an updated "Last updated" date and the updated version will be effective as soon as it is accessible.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions or comments about this policy, you may email us at support@postslify.com.

TermsPage.label: Legal
TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.intro: By using Postslify, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to Postslify. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Service
services.content: Postslify is an AI-powered platform designed to help users create, schedule, and optimize content for LinkedIn. We offer tools for idea generation, post drafting, and publication management.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: To access certain features, you must register and create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms.

responsibilities.title: 4. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content:
You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
  • You will not use the service to post illegal, offensive, or infringing content.
  • You will not attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of the service.
  • You are solely responsible for the content you generate and publish via our platform.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The service and its original content (excluding content provided by users) are the exclusive property of Postslify. The content you generate belongs to you, but you grant us a license to use it for the purpose of providing the service.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: Our service integrates with LinkedIn. Your use of LinkedIn is governed by its own terms and policies. We are not responsible for LinkedIn's actions or policies.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Postslify shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to the service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of any material changes.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@postslify.com.

Footer.description: Transform your LinkedIn presence with AI.
